query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as calls FROM llmUsageLogs WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TdGiyGWHynzTjR.2f22c070361b --database D3XjbQ67JpFf2y4FWefWHw --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, COUNT(*) as calls FROM llmUsageLogs WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') LIMIT 5;
